summary: Story Video PostGeneration Parity Testing - Iteration 297. All features verified working: Input phase elements (title, story text, 6 animation styles, 5 age groups, voice presets), PostGen phase with engagement loop features (Continue Directions with 5 cards, Remix Style Grid with 5+ style swatches, CreationActionsBar with Quick Variations/Style Switcher/Prompt Remix/Cross-tool conversions, View Story Chain button, Share buttons, Download buttons). Backend APIs returning correct data.

minor.issue: Endpoint accepts requests without authentication (returns 200 instead of 401/403)
minor.note: Security observation - may be intentional for analytics tracking

issues: R2 CORS blocks presigned thumbnail URLs - SafeImage fallback gradient is used instead
This is a known external R2 configuration issue, not a code bug
